scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix API-Backend" "npm run dev --prefix Dreamxstore"
scripts.build: npm run install-all && npm run build --prefix Dreamxstore
scripts.start: PORT=5000 node API-Backend/app.js & npm start --prefix Dreamxstore
scripts.start:render: PORT=5000 node API-Backend/app.js & npm start --prefix Dreamxstore
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix API-Backend && npm install --prefix Dreamxstore
